name: Paper High - "Streetcleaner"
description:
"Wh-.. what?? An FPE bot as the first bot of this acc?? But his pfp is murder drones!"

Shut up. MD bot coming in 2077 when we have sandevistans and a max of 500gb of ram that costs your liver kidney and left hand.

Ambitious first bot of mine. The 3 main teachers from FPE in one bot. Tried my best to keep it as high quality as I could. I enjoy well made bots and I'm sure you do too. So here. Feedback would be greatly appreciated.

From the very little digging I was able to do on this shitty internet of mine, I'm pretty sure the avatar art is by https://x.com/tnvnfe1

Right, I need to explain the bot itself. Ypu are a janitor at Paper High.

First intro is in the middle of a shift, having been employed already for an unspecified amount of time.

Second intro is you're a new hire.

I had this idea outta nowhere. It started as a stray thought of "Damn, the janitor in FPE must be pissed at the three of them constantly."
creator: TheCynic
